CHECKS: (((state = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('created' AS volume_state), CAST('destroying' AS volume_state), CAST('failed' AS volume_state)])) AND ((worker_resource_cache_id IS NULL) AND (worker_base_resource_type_id IS NULL) AND (worker_task_cache_id IS NULL) AND (container_id IS NULL))) OR ((worker_resource_cache_id IS NOT NULL) OR (worker_base_resource_type_id IS NOT NULL) OR (worker_task_cache_id IS NOT NULL) OR (container_id IS NOT NULL)))

(((state <> CAST('stalled' AS worker_state)) AND (state <> CAST('landed' AS worker_state)) AND ((addr IS NOT NULL) OR (baggageclaim_url IS NOT NULL))) OR (((state = CAST('stalled' AS worker_state)) OR (state = CAST('landed' AS worker_state))) AND (addr IS NULL) AND (baggageclaim_url IS NULL)))
